message.lifecycle.postload.moretasks: Some loading tasks will continue later.
message.lifecycle.unload.finish: Unload completed. Thank you for using UniversalPluginUpdater!
message.command.help: UniversalPluginUpdater provides plugin management and information lookup features.
It is similar to APT tools (like apt and apt-get),
and enables options more suitable for interactive by default.
/upu update - update list of available plugins
/upu download - download existing plugins' newer version by downloading
/upu upgrade - upgrade existing plugins by downloading/installing newer version
See docs for more information about the available commands.
Preferences can be configured through the config file.
This UPU has NO Super Cow Powers.
